name: Adobe Inc.
description: Adobe Inc. is a global leader in digital media and digital marketing solutions. The company's creative, marketing, and document solutions empower everyone—from individual artists to global brands—to bring digital creations to life and deliver immersive, compelling experiences to the right person at the right moment for the best results. Adobe's flagship products include Photoshop, Illustrator, and Acrobat, alongside its comprehensive Adobe Experience Cloud for enterprise marketing. Recently, the company has integrated generative AI through its Firefly models, revolutionizing creative workflows and content creation across its software suite.
